attacking_style: Launches multiple attacks on final climbs approximately 20km from finish, capable of soloing to victory after repeated explosive efforts on climbs.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team support patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with summit finishes suit him well; Tour de France showed weakness suggesting Vuelta-specific conditions (heat, late-season timing, or climb profiles) favor his characteristics.
vulnerability: Demonstrated weakness at Tour de France that did not appear at Vuelta, suggesting sensitivity to specific race conditions, peaking challenges, or particular terrain types present in July versus August-September.
key_patterns: Attacks multiple times on same climb to establish winning move (21km out observed)
Capable of soloing to victory after initial attack succeeds in creating gap
Can repeat stage wins within same Grand Tour showing recovery ability
form_trajectory: positive: Two stage wins in same Vuelta confirms strong late-season form and ability to recover between efforts
